title: Intelligence Dossiers Campaign
label: Agency archive push
summary: A campaign for CIA, NSA, declassified archives, surveillance, MKUltra, intelligence maps, and agency dossier reader paths.
boundary: Campaign calendars are reusable public planning assets. They are not promises of automated or live posting.
dailyPushes: Day 1: open with declassified archives and source-methodology boundaries.
Day 2: route readers to the intelligence network map.
Day 3: share the MKUltra / deep-state answer pages with caution labels.
Day 4: push CIA and NSA book pages.
Day 5: release the intelligence dossier pack.
Day 6: post a short video caption from the share kit.
Day 7: recap the agency archive and reader path.
